message:
fix(parser): validate zero-span in block-beta groups and blocks

Normalize zero span values to 1 with a warning instead of silently
accepting them. Both group and individual block spans now validate
their input: span:0 produces a diagnostic warning and coerces to
span:1 to avoid degenerate grid layouts. Includes a test exercising
zero-span coercion for both groups and blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
